replies.msg:
Q: Big salary is much more important than job satisfaction. Do you agree?

Nowadays, human resources have become an essential element of building a successful companies. Many job seekers absolutely want a good pay in their salary; while career consultants thinks that job satisfaction is the key factor of keeping a good career path. In my opinion, I completely disagree the statement 'Big salary is much more important than job satisfaction'. In fact, salary is only one of the consideration, but not the first priority, in developing a successful career path.

To begin with, job satisfaction can help you to maintain a stable career path. It is vital to recognize that stable career path helps you to make sustainable cash flow in the future. Just imagine if you are not happy with the working environment or workload, you will not stay long in that company. As a result, your monthly income become unstable and it becomes difficult to move further in the future. As my past experience, I worked in a Chinese investment bank. However, the company mission and colleagues did not match with my personality, so I resigned the job within two months. At the end, I needed to find job again. From this example, we can see the importance of job satisfaction in building career path.

Moreover, job satisfaction can build up sense of fulfillment. If you are satisfied with your work, you will certainly do better. Emotion and pressure can determinate your productivity level. Without sense of fulfillment, it is common to see the labors feel depressed easily and hence lower the productivity directly. It does not make sense to earn more under low level productivity. Based on my daily observations, many professionals suffer from mental illness under the high pressure working atmosphere and they need to find doctor eventually. Therefore, sense of fulfillment keeps the motivation and makes you feel happy. This explain why I emphasize the relationship between job satisfaction and sense of fulfillment.

To conclude, I strongly believe that job satisfaction is much more important
than salary because it keeps stable career path and give you sense of fulfillment.

有幾分

唔好用咁多絕對字眼
absolutely, completely 果啲
